buildProcess.description: Initialized Hardhat TypeScript project with LayerZero V2 OApp and OpenZeppelin dependencies. Configured networks for Base Sepolia and Arbitrum Sepolia.
decisions: Used LayerZero V2 OApp pattern for cross-chain messaging (simpler than raw endpoint calls)
Chose Base as Planner chain and Arbitrum as Worker chain for multi-chain demonstration
Solidity 0.8.27 with cancun EVM version for latest features

buildProcess.description: Designed three-contract architecture: TaskManager (planner/OApp on Base), WorkerNode (worker/OApp on Arbitrum), WorkerRegistry (discovery on any chain).
decisions: TaskManager holds ETH in escrow — reward locked on createTask, released after result verified
Status machine: Created → Dispatched → Completed → Paid prevents double-pay and premature release
WorkerNode stores received tasks locally so workers can process asynchronously
WorkerRegistry uses capability-string matching for flexible worker discovery
Payload encoding: abi.encode for dispatch (taskId, description, reward, worker) and result (taskId, resultHash, worker)

buildProcess.description: Built 9 tests using EndpointV2Mock and hardhat_impersonateAccount to simulate cross-chain LZ message delivery in a single-chain test environment.
decisions: Used EndpointV2Mock from @layerzerolabs/oapp-evm for realistic LZ endpoint behavior
Simulated _lzReceive by impersonating endpoint address — avoids needing full LZ infra in tests
Tested both happy paths and error paths (zero reward, early release, status guards)

buildProcess.description: Implemented swarm-agent.ts demonstrating the full Planner lifecycle: decompose task, discover workers, create tasks with rewards, dispatch via LZ, worker execution, result collection.
decisions: Structured output with phase icons for clear visualization
Simulated LZ delivery using same impersonation technique as tests
Two worker types (data-analysis, code-review) showing heterogeneous agent capabilities

buildProcess.description: Created README with badges and architecture diagram, animated SVG banner, interactive HTML visualizations showing the full task flow with CSS animations.
decisions: SVG banner with CSS-only animations (no JS) for GitHub compatibility
how-it-works.html: animated swarm scene with flying packets, play-through flow timeline, worker registry cards, task lifecycle tracker, expandable contract details
architecture.html: ASCII diagram, message flow visualization, payload structures, expandable contract specs
